spec.name: Spell That Protects
spec.summary: A spell that protects against effects using raw magic.
spec.effect_description: A spell that protects against effects using raw magic. A triangle ward/control recipe that channels raw discipline into photonic output. It applies a plane pattern against where written across self reach with immediate persistence.
